name: The White House
subject: The next chapter for the CIA
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf551c7a51b4ca954a4bb0a679070bff14a75256af7be878e95519318aa7a4e05989881f157a32a8f61ea5cbd7da3d3b5ea) The White House • May 2, 2018
## Driving the Day
President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence are traveling to the State Department for the formal swearing-in ceremony of Secretary of State Mike Pompeo. Gina Haspel is President Trump’s choice to succeed Pompeo as CIA Director. [Watch live at 11 a.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf56ea6ceec69cdd5da2e191181ab03deba9284b46dfafa41bd6b882e182818ccbf483b6525ad0899f059854e09fe204a0e) |
---
|

## The next chapter for the CIA
**President Trump travels to the State Department this morning**. After the Senate voted to confirm then-CIA Director Mike Pompeo as Secretary of State last Thursday, Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito swore Pompeo in, allowing him to begin work right away. Today, the President will [preside over a formal ceremony](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf56ea6ceec69cdd5da2e191181ab03deba9284b46dfafa41bd6b882e182818ccbf483b6525ad0899f059854e09fe204a0e) to introduce Secretary Pompeo to America’s diplomatic corps.
**As CIA Director, Mike Pompeo had a distinguished record**. In just 15 months, he provided invaluable leadership on intelligence efforts regarding Syrian chemical weapons, North Korean sanctions, and ISIS territorial holdings.
**To build on these successes, President Trump is calling on the Senate to confirm Gina Haspel** , current acting Director, to take over the Agency on a permanent basis. “Gina Haspel is a patriot,” said Sen. John Cornyn (R-TX). “She will be first woman director of the CIA and the first operations officer as opposed to a political appointee or an analyst in the last 40 years.”
[Read more of the bipartisan praise for Gina Haspel as CIA Director. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf5513194bc275698bcaba9da730cbb79a79054be2449561f202981ae9b60b633e126d2c8d5d5e85a8fb55fa8501502bc58)

---
|

## Video of the day: The Commander-in-Chief’s Trophy
**President Trump welcomed the Army Black Knights to the White House yesterday**. The U.S. Military Academy’s college football team defeated both the Navy Midshipmen and the Air Force Falcons this season to claim the Commander-in-Chief’s Trophy for the first time in 21 years.
**“Thank you for your service—and go Army!”** the President told the players.
[Watch highlights from the trophy presentation.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf5970953405fe012cc00b0d6f44a5179f8ffe5daf2449fd750478d878e06a99b089f425314ead572e602d1a803f5a9dccb)

---
|

## Our immigration system invites inhumane results
**This week, the “caravan” from Central America began arriving at the U.S. border**. Vice President Pence traveled to El Centro Station in California Monday to address the situation with American Border Patrol officials. “We’re grateful to each and every one of you,” the Vice President said.
**This situation is a direct result of our weak immigration laws** , President Trump said. “The truth is our immigration laws today are ineffective, and they invite inhumane results,” Vice President Pence explained in California. “We call on the Congress to close deadly immigration loopholes that are exploited by terrorists, traffickers, and criminals.”
[Read Vice President Pence’s full remarks on the caravan](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf572630fa7d8f99fdd44071ecc2dc8c21a58de03e1f0ce17dee559bbb80a9104374691437967fc778b79b796e205a6f6ec) and [see photos of his visit](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf52956a0dfc9763941735a4beb6c15f9b251765a6e99024b9d4684ba2a61d4648279553a64ea56ed9317f3811705dea52c) to the border.

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and the crew members and passengers of Southwest Airlines Flight 1380** | May 1, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf577ef65443d705a8598e47b2af4157d7e99e034bbc583feef6b738e40fab83e8419732029e5fea83e4bdec3a42ed8e20b) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ae7da74f3b65cdf56d37c249b19feba12912f0f766d4126517582b032014da194b1633d3a7cfc2816e110dd08cc58c32dd8c90f46f8c1af6) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4e3b754afc8f96b4972670ff3cdc7788bb907611db3b167ccdee629fd2e4c22ab4a40c09e8e1c021230de341783e163f860f7d894da16d613)

name: Bob Barrett
subject: Why I'm voting for Abby
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

My name is Bob Barrett, and I was born and raised in the 7th District. I was appointed to West Point by Congressman Tom Bliley, and I'm an Operation Iraqi Freedom veteran. I also used to work with Abigail Spanberger.

What always impressed me most about Abby was her calm, even approach when dealing with complicated situations and difficult client personalities. She never got flustered and always sought to learn more about the client's viewpoint by asking probing questions.

As a father of two young children, I want smart, intellectually curious, and engaged leaders asking pointed questions when officials are making decisions to send our men and women into harm's way. **We deserve leaders who won 't make conclusions before examining the evidence because it benefits their political narrative or will play to their base. **

As a former CIA officer, Abby has the skills and abilities to judge people's statements, understand complex problems, and think through the consequences of multiple courses of action. I witnessed Abby demonstrating these skills in resolving client problems by probing their assumptions, questioning their experiences with our services, and learning what they were attempting to accomplish.

Like many of you, I wasn't involved in politics until recently. Also like many of you, I am worried about our future. Despite all the doom and gloom, I've become hopeful. Part of that hope comes from the candidates that are running in 2018 for a brighter future. **Abby is our best hope in the 7th District to change the status quo and bring about real change.** For myself and my children, I'm voting for the hope of a better tomorrow.

**Please join me in supporting Abby in her quest to make a change in the 7th district by donating through the link below.**

Thank you,

Bob Barrett

We did it again, friend!

With each end-of-month goal we meet, I'm reminded how lucky and truly humbled I am to have the support of people like you in this fight to bring progressive change to Florida.

So thank you -- for believing in the possibility of a better state, for investing in a brighter future for all of us, and for being a dedicated member of our team.

Together, we're proving to the state and to the country that it is possible to run a successful people-powered campaign. And thanks to you, we're in a strong position going into the Democratic primary and November general election.

So from the bottom of my heart, thank you.

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Disenfranchising voters based on what they have in their wallets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Voting is difficult enough in the United States. We should not be disenfranchising eligible voters purely based on what they have in their wallets.
#
Friend,
What does it take to vote in America?
Most people believe the only requirements are that you must be: an American citizen, over the age of 18, and registered to vote.
The truth is, a significant number of Americans who fit every one of those criteria get turned away at the polls each election.
[**Thirty-four states have laws that request or require citizens to show arbitrarily specific forms of identification to vote. In ten of those states, the laws are very strict.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7abea/bed43eb/50613d59/75fd92b2/306810377/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/voter-id-laws") Many Americans who do not have the time or the money to get those forms of ID are unable to vote.
For 6 weeks, the Sanders Institute and founding fellow Senator Nina Turner are looking at some of the glaring issues in our voting system. This week, we are addressing voter ID laws in the United States.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7abea/bed43eb/50613d59/75fd92b2/306810377/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/voter-id-laws")
Voting is difficult enough in the United States. We should not be disenfranchising eligible voters purely based on what they have in their wallets.
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute Team

Republicans have pushed for purges of voter rolls, limited polling hours and early voting, restricted voter registration dates, and imposed verification requirements that make voting more difficult.

**Many of these restrictions are expected to have a disproportionate effect on people of color, seniors, and young people, limiting their voices.**

Governor Wolf thinks we should make it easier to vote. That's why he's worked to stop Republicans' voter suppression tactics. Instead, he's working to pass:
* Same day voter registration
* Automatic voter registration
* Modernized absentee voting

But long-term change requires grassroots support from people like you.

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Let's invest in entrepreneurs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdAT5Y9GdmBAN10lAC341LQrq1U3GkJv8KEFqQgDVUo=/OTlR2aSkDEu0XvKpkziufxfn0g9Yhv9JYR-qqgD8tks=) Friends and Neighbors -- For the better part of the last year, the location of Amazon's second location has been a hot topic. Nearly every state in America has been vying to bring them -- including Florida -- with over the top PR campaigns, fancy dinners, and promises of exorbitant tax breaks. And, while I believe in providing incentives to help attract business in our state, does a company like Amazon who just posted over $51 BILLION in revenue for last _QUARTER_ really need tax breaks from cities like Miami in order to attract them? Especially when Florida already boasts no income tax? ** ** **Wouldn 't it be better to use that money to invest in entrepreneurs that can build the next Amazon from Florida rather than just bringing a second HQ to Florida? ** [Help Jeremy Get to the Cabinet. Chip in $3.](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdAT5Y9GdmBAN10lAC341LQrq1U3GkJv8KEFqQgDVUo=/kXgr0WemQD0_R7TBz2yrYh4VT2C-y_ZeGi3irhHlHDE=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) The answer is YES - and as your next Chief Financial Officer, that's exactly what I plan to advocate for. The way I see it, the CFO isn't only the state's chief bill payer, but with access to over $200 billion in capital, they are also the state's Chief Innovation Officer. From the next Amazon to the small businesses we are celebrating this week, innovation is exactly what Florida needs. As your next CFO, I would endeavor also to be your Chief Innovation Officer. But I have to get to Tallahassee first. **And I can 't get there without your help**. [**Can you contribute $3 or more today to bring our innovative vision to the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VdAT5Y9GdmBAN10lAC341LQrq1U3GkJv8KEFqQgDVUo=/kXgr0WemQD0_R7TBz2yrYh4VT2C-y_ZeGi3irhHlHDE=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---

Monday was Cecile Richards' last day as president of Planned Parenthood and Planned Parenthood Action Fund.
Over the last 12 years, Cecile served as not just the leader of one of the largest women's health providers in the country, but as a leader for reproductive rights, for women, and for access to health care.
In her departing note, Cecile made one ask:

And don't ever stop standing with Planned Parenthood, with women, with people of color, with LGBTQ people, with immigrants, with young people, with patients, with doctors, with those who are shut out of power and silenced and ignored by our leaders."_
Look, with Donald Trump in the White House and anti-choice leaders in control of Congress, we need to make good on Cecile's request.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party

| Friend,

**Big news: we beat our first FEC fundraising goal since Rick Scott announced! **

The whole team here wants to extend a sincere thank you to everyone who helped us over the top, and remind all of our supporters that your grassroots energy has the power to change Florida forever.

Just yesterday, **Democrat Javier Hernandez pulled off another amazing victory in House District 114** , a critical swing seat that has long been held by a Republican.

As we've seen nationwide, local races like this are being used as a bellwether of the resistance against Donald Trump. With yet another victory, we're one step closer to a blow-out in November.

With Rick Scott putting everything he has into a Senate run, and the GOP candidates for governor going farther right than ever before, we need to prove that Floridians are ready to turn out for Democrats up and down the ballot. We can't let the Scott-Trump agenda keep Florida in its grip.

[**We depend on grassroots supporters like you to make our work possible. With you at our back, we can continue fighting for our shared values, defending President Obama 's legacy, and turning out Democrats across Florida.**](http://act.floridadems. name: John Gregg
subject: the space and the tools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We all want what's best for our state and our country. In 2018, that means re-electing Joe to the Senate. But I know that's going to take all of our hard work and determination. |
---

| | Peter,

When I ran for governor in 2016, meeting with Hoosier voters was my favorite part of the campaign. And talking with as many voters as we did was only possible because we invested early in a solid organizing team across the state.

Now, I'm back on the trail helping my friend, Joe Donnelly, who's running for re-election to the U.S. Senate. It's going to be a tough race, so it's critical that Joe's team is able to reach out to voters in each of Indiana's 92 counties. And that means they need infrastructure: Organizers, volunteers, and field offices.

**Today, I 'm asking you to make a donation to make sure Joe's team has the space and the tools to win this race and keep fighting for Indiana families.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20bc/7377f838/3ee8aad8/51f945c8/872321311/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fieldofficefund?express_lane=true&refcode=20180502nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20bc/7377f838/3ee8aad8/51f945cb/872321311/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fieldofficefund?express_lane=true&refcode=20180502nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20bc/7377f838/3ee8aad8/51f945ca/872321311/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fieldofficefund?express_lane=true&refcode=20180502nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20bc/7377f838/3ee8aad8/51f945c5/872321311/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fieldofficefund?express_lane=true&refcode=20180502nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20bc/7377f838/3ee8aad8/51f945c4/872321311/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fieldofficefund?refcode=20180502nd")**
When Hoosier Democrats opened their first field office in Carmel last month, it was a huge milestone that was only made possible because of dedicated supporters like you. But with fewer than 200 days left until the election, it's time to take the next step.

The folks who worked for my campaign in 2016 are some of the most loyal and hardworking people I've ever met. Now many of them -- many of you -- are fighting just as hard to re-elect Joe, the senator who we know will continue to do the best job for Indiana.

I want to make sure, as they fight day in and day out, that they have all the support they need -- offices to work out of, tables and chairs where they can make phone calls, and even pizza to eat!

We all want what's best for our state and our country. In 2018, that means re-electing Joe to the Senate. But I know that's going to take all of our hard work and determination.

**[Will you chip in $5 today to help Joe's team open field offices and reach out to voters all over the state?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c20bc/7377f838/3ee8aad8/51f945c7/872321311/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-fieldofficefund?refcode=20180502nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
John Gregg

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Cut the red tape
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
In December, Senate Republicans passed a tax scam masquerading as a bill, set to give massive windfalls to Wall Street, big corporations, and the wealthiest 1% at the expense of American families.
This week, Republican Senator Marco Rubio, admitted, "There's no evidence whatsoever that the money's been massively poured back into the American worker."
In fact, Trump's "small-business tax cut" primarily helps wealthy developers and investors, like himself, not small businesses and working families.
As we celebrate the contributions of small businesses this Small Business Week, we can't continue to build a system that strangles small businesses. We must be on the side of working people and small business owners. Cut the red tape and ensure they get what they need to grow.
**[We can't let the GOP get away with stripping basic provisions from hard working Americans to give tax breaks to billionaires. If you believe in the power of progressives to fight for tax fairness can you chip in $5 to our campaign today?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f2/7ab0e2c4/7fbfcb75/349a51e7/1346273663/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDUwMjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ05028C")**
Investment in small business means an investment in the American dream...putting Americans to work today, building the infrastructure of tomorrow. We must invest in federal infrastructure jobs and provide incentives for small business to invest in employees and economy.
According to an April poll by CNBC, more than half of the public say they see absolutely no change in their paycheck.
Maryland families are already struggling with wages that aren't rising fast enough while paying more and more for their healthcare and housing. The last thing they need is a tax increase.
Republicans have decided to put permanent tax cuts for massive corporations ahead of protecting real American people, and **this will not stand.**
**[We can and must do better. Marylanders have no time to waste -- chip in $5 today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7f2/7ab0e2c4/7fbfcb75/349a51e7/1346273663/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDUwMjhDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ05028C")**
Onward,
Ben
